name: browser-query-proxy-architecture
description: Browser-side query execution for Postgres-backed collections needs proxy through MCP. Current MCPPersistence handles save/load. For queries: (1) CollectionQueryable detects x-persistence.backend='postgres', (2) Instead of local execution, serializes query and sends to MCP, (3) MCP executes via BunSqlExecutor, returns results, (4) Browser hydrates results. This completes isomorphic story but adds complexity.
recommendation: Phase 2 scope: Focus on server-side execution first. Browser proxy (req-13) is 'could' priority. May need new store.query MCP tool to support browser-to-server query proxy.
